name: claude-godmode
description: Senior engineering team, in a plugin. One arrow chain (/godmode → /mission → /brief → /plan → /build → /verify → /ship), 11 skills, mechanical quality gates.

model_profile.description: Quality vs cost tradeoff for agent model selection. Substituted into hook commands as ${user_config.model_profile} and exported as CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_MODEL_PROFILE to subprocesses.
